title: Playground Admin Ledger
concept: A dense WordPress-admin-like dashboard for documentation writers preparing repeatable demos, with a tabbed workspace, saved-site ledger tables, compact source forms, and high-contrast black, white, and cyan technical styling.
focus: tabbed workspace instead of modal-first navigation
dense tables and filters for repeated demo preparation
distinct browser-storage and local-directory save destinations
visible destructive reset, import, delete, and reload consequences
flows: Prepare a documentation demo from the first viewport by reviewing the active temporary Playground, selecting a launch source, choosing save destination, confirming progress, and seeing the resulting saved identity.
Start new Playgrounds through distinct Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import forms with their real constraints visible.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds in a ledger table with rename, delete, open, browser storage, local directory, temporary, and overwrite states.
Use the Site Manager tab set for settings reset or saved reload, file browsing and code editing, Blueprint bundle actions, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, and path refresh.
Browse the Blueprint catalog with category filters, search, dense 43-entry framing, selected Blueprint detail, run, inspect JSON, and copy URL actions.
Move demo artifacts through GitHub export, .zip download, .zip import over the current site, Blueprint bundle download, Blueprint link copy, and database.sqlite download.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
